h3. *Test scenario*

Verification of the adaptive filter in a simulation environment
* Target speed: 70 km/h
* Target: stationary objects at various positions near the boundary
* Lane width: 3.5 m
* Scenario: scenario_test_01_basic

h3. *Test results*

!chart-1.png!
* Offset of 15 cm activated when target position reaches -2.4 m
* Offset of 30 cm activated when target position reaches -2.19 m
* DecideOffset signal shows stable transitions without oscillation
* No unnecessary toggling observed in the steady-state zone

h3. *Conclusion*

The filter successfully eliminates oscillation. Stable operation confirmed in the simulation environment.
h2.
_Draft content — review pending_
